question: [File: 'File Name: rest/service/fileDataService.js -> Scope: Critical: Network not being able to confirm new transactions (total network shutdown)'] [Function: fallbackRetry()] Can an unprivileged external user exhaust all 10 retry attempts in fallbackRetry() by ensuring every file_data row for the exchange rate file contains malformed/unparseable bytes, causing getExchangeRate() to return null and the mirror node to serve no valid exchange rate, leading to all downstream transaction fee validations failing and a total network transaction confirmation shutdown?
